title: Cool Bosses & Crafts I - Resource pack
description: The CBC1 resource pack that acompanies the CBC1 Data Pack
body:
This is the official CBC1 (Cool Bosses and Crafts I) Resource Pack, it has been made to acompany the CBC1 Data Pack, this resourcepck is required for things such as the music in new music disks, items and other things.

**CBC1 Data Pack:**
[https://modrinth.com/datapack/cbc1_datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cbc1_datapack)

If you find any bug please report it on the Discord Server.

**Discord Link here:**
[https://discord.gg/7pAHmxZX5Y](https://discord.gg/7pAHmxZX5Y)
